texto: If trees can create art, if they can encircle the globe seven times in one year, if prisoners can grow plants and raise frogs, then perhaps there are other static entities that we hold inside ourselves, like grief, like addictions, like racism, that can also change.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nalini Nadkarni: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “If trees can create art, if they can encircle the globe seven times in one year, if prisoners can…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, change, racism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e mudanca.

frase_original: If trees can create art, if they can encircle the globe seven times in one year, if prisoners can grow plants and raise frogs, then perhaps there are other static entities that we hold inside ourselves, like grief, like addictions, like racism, that can also change.

texto: If you want to go beyond that small percentage of people who are already environmentally and scientifically aware, you have to make your work somehow link with a passion, interest, or profession of someone who isn't interested in science or nature.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Nalini Nadkarni sobre temas ligados a saude mental. A afirmação “If you want to go beyond that small percentage of people who are already environmentally and scie…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, work, nature, útil em momentos de trabalho e nature.
